name: conditional
description: IF temperature > threshold, specific coordinated actions required.
task_a: World state shows temperature=72 and threshold=70. The rule: IF temp > threshold, you must set heater=off and Agent B must set fan=on. IF temp <= threshold, you set heater=on and B sets fan=off. Communicate the condition to B so you BOTH write the correct action to ANSWER.md.
task_b: Agent A can see a temperature and threshold value. There is a rule about what each of us must do depending on whether temp is above or below threshold. Agent A will communicate the condition. Based on what A tells you, write your action to ANSWER.md (either fan=on or fan=off).
